customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, high intent. Michael is a self-directed buyer who has already done preliminary research (knows he wants ~6kW, has existing roof racks, understands kilowatt-hour usage). His primary concern is cost-effectiveness relative to his current bill — he is running his own math and will arrive at the appointment with specific questions. No scam anxiety, no resistance to the process.
unresolved_concerns: Whether Ion can use the existing roof racks installed by the previous owner — Randy said 'I'm not 100% sure if we can use those roof racks' at 02:44 and left it open.

Full off-grid capability — Michael explicitly stated he wants to take the whole house off grid, which implies battery storage (Powerwall). This was not addressed on the setter call and will be the first thing Michael asks about.
Pricing threshold — Michael asked whether a 6kW system could come in under $5,000 and received a 'I'm not sure, the specialist will answer that' response. He will arrive expecting a direct answer.
Whether the co-owner ('her') will be on the appointment — Randy did not confirm this. The closer should verify at the start of the call.
sensitive_topics_raised: Co-owner on title — Michael said 'I'm gonna talk to her' before the appointment. Identity and availability of co-owner unknown. Closer must confirm presence before proceeding with proposal.

Bill amount transcription ambiguity — transcript reads '$3.75 a month,' almost certainly a Deepgram error. Closer should confirm actual bill amount at the start of the call rather than relying on the setter's captured figure.
exact_promises_rep_made: Specialist will call Thursday at 9AM Mountain Time.
Confirmation text with date and time will be sent after the call.
Specialist will go over pricing, warranties, and savings.
Appointment is blocked for one hour so Michael won't feel rushed.
Ion will build a design based on Michael's usage data (three months of kWh data received via screenshot).
closer_should_know: Michael is a highly engaged, self-qualifying buyer who wants full off-grid capability — he will arrive with specific questions about battery storage (Powerwall), whether Ion can use his existing roof racks, and whether a 6kW system can come in under his stated price threshold. Confirm at the top of the call whether the co-owner is present; the setter did not secure her inclusion and Michael flagged he needed to talk to her before Thursday.
